summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive PRs are routed individually; unrelated non-security PRs are kept for maintainer review or proof follow-up. Already-closed PR #84955 is recorded as skipped keep_closed.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR in a related secret-handling area; no safe close or merge action is available in this plan-mode inventory job.
The PR concerns plaintext provider API key exposure and is explicitly security-sensitive in the artifact, so it must be quarantined to central security handling.
The PR is a distinct ACPX behavior fix needing proof; it should not be closed or merged from this cluster.
Potentially useful related work, but there is no inventory-level canonical or permitted merge/fix action.
Runtime trusted-tool attestation and policy enforcement changes are security-boundary work and must route to central security handling.
Related provider-secret work with passing proof, but not a duplicate/closure candidate in this inventory shard.
This is a small independent open PR with passing proof; the closed historical ref does not justify closure in this plan-mode inventory job.
